entities.name: SYSTEMS MODELLING
entities.description: The use of models to represent the components of a farming system to inform decision-making.

entities.name: FARM DECISIONS
entities.description: Choices made by farmers regarding their agricultural practices to improve outcomes.

entities.name: RESILIENCE
entities.description: The capacity of a farm system to recover from difficulties or shocks.

entities.name: PROFIT
entities.description: The financial gain resulting from farming activities.

entities.name: TELANGANA STATE
entities.description: A state in India where the research pretesting was conducted.

entities.name: INDIAN VILLAGE
entities.description: The specific site in Telangana State where 150 families were surveyed.

entities.name: QUESTIONNAIRE
entities.description: A data collection tool developed by ICRISAT to gather information for simulation modelling.

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics, the organization that developed the questionnaire.

entities.name: WHOLE FARM SIMULATION MODEL
entities.description: A model used to simulate the entire farming system based on gathered data.

entities.name: ICAR
entities.description: Indian Council of Agricultural Research, an organization supporting farmers in making informed decisions.
